steps: Go to https://opencagedata.com/users/sign_up to create a free account
Verify your email address via the confirmation email
Your API key is displayed in the 'Geocoding API' tab
Copy the key and use it as the 'key' query parameter in API requests

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your OpenCage API key, passed as the 'key' query parameter in geocoding requests

notes: The API key is passed as a query parameter (?key=YOUR_KEY), not as a header
Free accounts are limited to one API key; subscription accounts can have multiple
No credit card required for the free trial
Rate limit on free plan is 1 request/second

test_endpoint.description: Forward geocode a location to verify the API key is valid
